name: formspec-workspace
description: Formspec monorepo — a JSON-native declarative form specification with dual TypeScript/Python reference implementations

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@formspec-org/types && npm run build --workspace=@formspec-org/layout && npm run build --workspace=@formspec-org/engine && npm run build --workspace=@formspec-org/core && npm run build --workspace=@formspec-org/webcomponent && npm run build --workspace=@formspec-org/adapters && npm run build --workspace=@formspec-org/studio-core && npm run build --workspace=@formspec-org/mcp && npm run build --workspace=@formspec-org/studio
scripts.start:studio: npm run build --workspace=@formspec-org/engine && npm run build --workspace=@formspec-org/layout && npm run build --workspace=@formspec-org/webcomponent && npm run dev --workspace=@formspec-org/studio
scripts.test:unit: npm run build:types && npm run --workspace @formspec-org/engine test && npm run --workspace @formspec-org/webcomponent test && npm run --workspace @formspec-org/adapters test && npm run --workspace @formspec-org/layout test && npm run --workspace @formspec-org/core test && npm run --workspace @formspec-org/studio-core test && npm run --workspace @formspec-org/mcp test && npm run --workspace @formspec-org/studio test
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:studio:e2e
scripts.docs:fel-core: cargo doc-md -p fel-core --no-deps -o target/doc-md-fel-core && node scripts/bundle-rustdoc-md.mjs fel-core doc-md-fel-core fel_core crates/fel-core/docs/rustdoc-md/API.md && cargo doc -p fel-core --no-deps
scripts.docs:formspec-core: cargo doc-md -p formspec-core --no-deps -o target/doc-md-formspec-core && node scripts/bundle-rustdoc-md.mjs formspec-core doc-md-formspec-core formspec_core crates/formspec-core/docs/rustdoc-md/API.md && cargo doc -p formspec-core --no-deps
scripts.docs:formspec-lint: cargo doc-md -p formspec-lint --no-deps -o target/doc-md-formspec-lint && node scripts/bundle-rustdoc-md.mjs formspec-lint doc-md-formspec-lint formspec_lint crates/formspec-lint/docs/rustdoc-md/API.md && cargo doc -p formspec-lint --no-deps
scripts.docs:formspec-eval: cargo doc-md -p formspec-eval --no-deps -o target/doc-md-formspec-eval && node scripts/bundle-rustdoc-md.mjs formspec-eval doc-md-formspec-eval formspec_eval crates/formspec-eval/docs/rustdoc-md/API.md && cargo doc -p formspec-eval --no-deps
scripts.start:references: npm run build --workspace=@formspec-org/engine && npm run build --workspace=@formspec-org/layout && npm run build --workspace=@formspec-org/webcomponent && npm run dev --workspace=formspec-references
scripts.deploy: npm run build:hosting && npx -y firebase-tools@latest deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build:hosting && npx -y firebase-tools@latest hosting:channel:deploy preview
